external_references.description: Anthropic. (2025, November). Disrupting the first reported AI-orchestrated cyber espionage campaign. Retrieved April 20, 2026.

objects.description: During the [Anthropic AI-orchestrated Campaign](https://attack.mitre.org/campaigns/C0062), the adversary utilized Claude Code to automatically generate comprehensive documentation throughout the phases of the attack, including discovered services, harvested credentials, sensitive data, exploitation techniques, and complete attack progression.(Citation: Anthropic AI Orchestrated Campaign NOV 2025)
